codeReview.summary: The original blocking issue against decfa02 remains valid for that historical commit, but the current milestone state has since fixed it: production decode ownership now lives in core/src/repository/mod.rs through a shared raw-row decode pipeline reused by save-return and foreign-aware read entrypoints, so the milestone now satisfies the runtime-code requirement.

summary: Pass: decfa02 was correctly rejected as test-only, and current HEAD now contains real production decode-boundary ownership in core/src/repository/mod.rs, so the original blocking issue is fixed in the present milestone state.
